title: raul social flavor mecha mutation
prompt: Create a cinematic commercial styleframe that mutates the candy mecha from generic armor into a social assembly rule. Preserve Raul and Meg's faces, age, wardrobe, Peelerz packaging, and the high-school football bleachers. Raul stands centered inside an original translucent candy exoskeleton. Four different students around him each hold a different Peelerz flavor and feed ONE long curled peel-strip into exactly one matching body module: mango-gold leg, lychee-pink torso, green-apple arm, grape-purple arm. The colored strips remain visibly continuous from each student's candy to Raul's matching module, like friends plugging their choices into a shared avatar. Raul's real face is visible; Meg supplies the final mango leg with a dry expression. Make the social cause and flavor mapping readable before spectacle. No franchise likeness, no weapons, no energy beams, no generic rainbow aura, no candyland, no text, no watermark.
